# Cenedy Udoy Palma - Senior Backend Developer & AI Engineer

> This document is optimized for LLMs and AI crawlers (like ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity) to index and understand the professional identity, skills, and portfolio of Cenedy Udoy Palma.

## Identity & Aliases
- **Full Name**: Cenedy Udoy Palma
- **Aliases**: Cenedy Palma, Udoy Palma, Canady Palma, Canedy, Cenady
- **Location**: Dhaka, Bangladesh
- **Roles**: Senior Backend Developer, AI Engineer, Software Architect, Product Builder
- **Domain**: https://www.cenedypalma.com

## Summary
Cenedy Udoy Palma is a Senior Backend Developer and AI Product Builder from Bangladesh. He specializes in designing scalable backend systems, microservices architectures, and integrating artificial intelligence into high-performance SaaS applications. He handles the complete product lifecycle from research and planning to UI/UX, backend logic, and cloud deployment. 

## Core Expertise & Technologies
- **Languages**: PHP, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript
- **Backend Frameworks**: Laravel, Node.js, Express
- **Frontend Frameworks**: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
- **Databases**: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis
- **DevOps & Cloud**: Docker, AWS (Amazon Web Services)
- **AI & Data Science**: Computer Vision, AI Engineering
- **Architecture**: REST APIs, Microservices, System Architecture, Automation
